title: Days of Thrills and Laughter
actors: Roscoe 'Fatty' Arbuckle, Charles Chaplin, Charley Chase
plot: An appreciative, uncritical look at silent film comedies and thrillers from early in the century through the 1920s. It starts with a 1905 look at French comedy, goes through the 1910s with Sennett, Chaplin, and Fairbanks, and into...
